scenarios.name: Typed users API with shared client
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses Hono and Zod manually but misses the RPC pattern entirely (no AppType export, no hc client, no zValidator middleware); treatment exports typeof route as AppType, uses hc<AppType> with $post, and applies zValidator('json', schema) with c.req.valid('json').

scenarios.name: Cloudflare Workers D1 API with auth headers
scenarios.rationale: Baseline correctly uses Hono<{ Bindings }> and D1 prepare/bind/run but has no AppType export and uses raw fetch for auth; treatment chains routes, exports AppType, and uses hc<AppType>(url, { headers: { Authorization } }) per the skill's auth pattern.
